title: Daily Recommendations
description: A collection of recommended Duas for daily recitation.

duas.title: Morning Dua
duas.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa aali Muhammad
duas.translation: O Allah, send peace and blessings upon Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلٰى مُحَمَّدٍ وَّآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa aali Muhammad
segments.translation: O Allah, send peace and blessings upon Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad.

duas.title: Evening Dua
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

segments.translation: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

_index_meta.title: Daily Recommendations
_index_meta.description: A collection of recommended Duas for daily recitation.
